name: Italian Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Black olives, pitted and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Strain the chicken and reserve the stock for another use.
2. Debone and remove skin from the chicken.
3. Shred the meat.
4. Sauté onions and celery in olive oil for a short time.
5. Add the shredded chicken and mix well with all other ingredients until heated.
6. Serve cold or hot.
